# DatePicker

A date selection component with calendar views, navigation controls, range selection, and preset triggers. Composed of many sub-components for a fully customizable date picking experience.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  DatePicker,
  DatePickerControl,
  DatePickerInput,
  DatePickerTrigger,
  DatePickerContent,
  DatePickerPositioner,
  DatePickerLabel,
  DatePickerTable,
  DatePickerViewControl,
  DatePickerPrevTrigger,
  DatePickerNextTrigger,
  DatePickerViewTrigger,
  DatePickerView,
  DatePickerClearTrigger,
  DatePickerRangeText,
  DatePickerMonthSelect,
  DatePickerYearSelect,
  DatePickerWeekNumberCell,
  DatePickerWeekNumberCellText,
  DatePickerWeekNumberHeaderCell,
  DatePickerIndicatorGroup,
  DatePickerHeader,
  DatePickerDayTable,
  DatePickerMonthTable,
  DatePickerYearTable,
  DatePickerValueText,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `DatePicker` | The root wrapper (renders `DatePicker.Root`). Manages date state |
| `DatePickerControl` | Container for the input and trigger |
| `DatePickerInput` | The text input displaying the selected date |
| `DatePickerTrigger` | Button to toggle the calendar popover |
| `DatePickerContent` | The calendar popover content |
| `DatePickerPositioner` | Positions the popover relative to the control |
| `DatePickerLabel` | Label for the date picker |
| `DatePickerTable` | The calendar table grid |
| `DatePickerViewControl` | Container for view navigation (prev, next, view trigger) |
| `DatePickerPrevTrigger` | Button to navigate to the previous month/year |
| `DatePickerNextTrigger` | Button to navigate to the next month/year |
| `DatePickerViewTrigger` | Button to switch between day/month/year views |
| `DatePickerView` | Container for a specific calendar view (day, month, year) |
| `DatePickerClearTrigger` | Button to clear the selected date |
| `DatePickerRangeText` | Displays the selected date range as text |
| `DatePickerMonthSelect` | A select dropdown to pick a month directly |
| `DatePickerYearSelect` | A select dropdown to pick a year directly |
| `DatePickerWeekNumberCell` | A table cell displaying a week number |
| `DatePickerWeekNumberCellText` | The text content inside a week number cell |
| `DatePickerWeekNumberHeaderCell` | The header cell for the week number column |
| `DatePickerIndicatorGroup` | Container for grouping indicator elements in the control |
| `DatePickerHeader` | The header area of the date picker content |
| `DatePickerDayTable` | The calendar table for the day view |
| `DatePickerMonthTable` | The calendar table for the month view |
| `DatePickerYearTable` | The calendar table for the year view |
| `DatePickerValueText` | Displays the selected date value as text |

Additional table sub-components are also exported: `DatePickerTableHeader`, `DatePickerTableBody`, `DatePickerTableRow`, `DatePickerTableCell`, `DatePickerTableCellTrigger`, `DatePickerTableHead`, `DatePickerPresetTrigger`, `DatePickerHiddenInput`.

## DatePicker (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `DateValue[]` | - | Controlled selected date value(s) |
| `defaultValue` | `DateValue[]` | - | Initial selected date for uncontrolled usage |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: DateValue[], valueAsString: string[] }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the date changes |
| `min` | `DateValue` | - | The minimum selectable date |
| `max` | `DateValue` | - | The maximum selectable date |
| `locale` | `string` | - | The locale for date formatting (e.g., `"en-US"`) |
| `selectionMode` | `"single" \| "multiple" \| "range"` | `"single"` | The selection mode |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the date picker is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<DatePicker>
  <DatePickerLabel>Select date</DatePickerLabel>
  <DatePickerControl>
    <DatePickerInput />
    <DatePickerTrigger />
  </DatePickerControl>
  <DatePickerPositioner>
    <DatePickerContent>
      <DatePickerView view="day">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerTable />
      </DatePickerView>
    </DatePickerContent>
  </DatePickerPositioner>
</DatePicker>
```

### Range selection

```jsx
<DatePicker selectionMode="range">
  <DatePickerLabel>Date range</DatePickerLabel>
  <DatePickerControl>
    <DatePickerInput />
    <DatePickerTrigger />
  </DatePickerControl>
  <DatePickerPositioner>
    <DatePickerContent>
      <DatePickerView view="day">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerTable />
      </DatePickerView>
      <DatePickerRangeText />
    </DatePickerContent>
  </DatePickerPositioner>
</DatePicker>
```

### With clear button

```jsx
<DatePicker>
  <DatePickerControl>
    <DatePickerInput />
    <DatePickerTrigger />
    <DatePickerClearTrigger />
  </DatePickerControl>
  <DatePickerPositioner>
    <DatePickerContent>
      <DatePickerView view="day">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerTable />
      </DatePickerView>
    </DatePickerContent>
  </DatePickerPositioner>
</DatePicker>
```

### With month/year selects and value text

```jsx
<DatePicker>
  <DatePickerLabel>Select date</DatePickerLabel>
  <DatePickerControl>
    <DatePickerInput />
    <DatePickerIndicatorGroup>
      <DatePickerTrigger />
      <DatePickerClearTrigger />
    </DatePickerIndicatorGroup>
  </DatePickerControl>
  <DatePickerPositioner>
    <DatePickerContent>
      <DatePickerView view="day">
        <DatePickerHeader>
          <DatePickerMonthSelect />
          <DatePickerYearSelect />
        </DatePickerHeader>
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerDayTable />
      </DatePickerView>
      <DatePickerView view="month">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerMonthTable />
      </DatePickerView>
      <DatePickerView view="year">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerYearTable />
      </DatePickerView>
      <DatePickerValueText />
    </DatePickerContent>
  </DatePickerPositioner>
</DatePicker>
```

### With min/max constraints

```jsx
import { parseDate } from "@internationalized/date";

<DatePicker
  min={parseDate("2024-01-01")}
  max={parseDate("2024-12-31")}
>
  <DatePickerControl>
    <DatePickerInput />
    <DatePickerTrigger />
  </DatePickerControl>
  <DatePickerPositioner>
    <DatePickerContent>
      <DatePickerView view="day">
        <DatePickerViewControl>
          <DatePickerPrevTrigger />
          <DatePickerViewTrigger />
          <DatePickerNextTrigger />
        </DatePickerViewControl>
        <DatePickerTable />
      </DatePickerView>
    </DatePickerContent>
  </DatePickerPositioner>
</DatePicker>
```

## Features

- Full calendar date picker with day, month, and year views
- Supports single, multiple, and range selection modes
- Min/max date constraints for limiting selectable dates
- Locale-aware date formatting
- Navigation between months and years
- Clear trigger to reset the selected date
- Preset triggers for quick date shortcuts
- Hidden input for native form submission
- Compound component pattern for fully customizable layouts
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
